title: These Are the Players in the Million-Dollar Dinosaur Fossil Business
title_cn: 这些是价值数百万美元的恐龙化石业务的参与者
summary:
Why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires and billionaires like Ken Griffin?

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, we are joined by Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron. He tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway how the private market for fossils actually works and how similar it is to the market for art and other antiquities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Baltimore’s Mayor on Why the City Is More Than What You See on TV

summary:
Since Mayor Brandon Scott first took office in 2020, he's made it his mission to fix Baltimore's vacant housing crisis and make room for usable housing supply.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Mayor Scott tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about the historic effects of gun violence and why Baltimore natives aren't huge fans of The Wire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meme Stock GameStop Pitches $56 Billion eBay Takeover
title_cn: Meme 股票 GameStop 宣布以 560 亿美元收购 eBay
summary: GameStop is proposing to buy eBay for about $56 billion in cash and stock, offering $125 per share in cash and stock for the online marketplace, or about a 20% premium to its Friday close. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rally With Asia Hitting Record on AI Trade | The Opening Trade 5/4/2026
title_cn: 亚洲股市上涨，人工智能交易创历史新高开盘交易 5/4/2026
summary:
US equity futures pointed to further gains after Asian shares hit a fresh record on optimism around the artificial intelligence trade and stronger-than-expected earnings from megacap tech companies. The yen briefly spiked higher as traders remained on edge over possible intervention by the Bank of Japan.

Brent crude whipsawed, initially dropping 2.4%, then reversing those losses to trade above $108 a barrel. The fluctuations came after President Donald Trump said the US would begin guiding ships not involved in the Iran conflict through the Strait of Hormuz from Monday. The announcement left shipping executives perplexed, as attacks continue and traffic remains at a near standstill. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Sees Tech Earnings Eclipsing Iran War for Stocks
title_cn: 摩根士丹利认为科技股的盈利超过了伊朗股市战争
summary: Strong US corporate earnings led by a buoyant tech sector are overshadowing fears that the Middle East conflict could weigh on stocks, according to strategists at Morgan Stanley.

title: How Baltimore's Mayor Is Fighting the City's Vacant Housing Crisis | Odd Lots
title_cn: 巴尔的摩市长如何应对该市的空置住房危机零股
summary: Since Mayor Brandon Scott first took office in 2020, he's fixated on a very visible problem in Baltimore: the tens of thousands of vacant homes that dot the city. It's hard to build new houses when there are so many that sit empty and unused. And the process of tracking down owners, convincing them to sell their vacant properties, and then converting those homes into usable housing supply is a tall task. In the last few years, the number of vacant homes in Baltimore has dropped from 16,000 to just over 11,800. On this episode — recorded in Madrid while we attended the Bloomberg CityLab conference — we speak to Mayor Scott about deindustrialization, redlining, and gun violence's historical effects on the current housing crisis, how his government identifies, block-by-block, redevelopment opportunities and matches projects with publicly-minded developers, and why Baltimore natives aren't huge fans of The Wire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung Shares Lag SK Hynix’s Rally as Analysts Cite Strike Risk

title: Russian to Plead Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Hack
title_cn: 俄罗斯承认石油和天然气设施黑客攻击罪
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries will plead guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison, according to federal filings and his lawyer.

title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
title_cn: 演员本·麦肯齐 (Ben McKenzie) 在《医生》中探索加密货币欺诈。
summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Central Bank Files Complaint in Erste ‘Blackmail’ Case
title_cn: 匈牙利央行对 Erste“勒索”案提出投诉
summary: Hungary’s central bank said it has filed a criminal complaint after an internal investigation into alleged misconduct linked to the way its former leadership acted toward Erste Group Bank AG.

title: Europe Needs Bigger Banks, Cross-Border M&A, Top Official Says
title_cn: 高级官员表示，欧洲需要更大的银行和跨境并购
summary: Europe needs bigger banks and more cross-border mergers, a top euro-area official said when asked about UniCredit SpA’s potential acquisition of Commerzbank AG.

title: Taiwan’s Lai Heads Home After Defying China to Visit Africa
title_cn: 台湾赖清德不顾中国访问非洲后回国
summary: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te has departed Eswatini for home following a surprise trip to Africa in defiance of Beijing’s efforts to thwart his diplomatic outreach.

title: Paranoia, Turmoil and Backlash: Inside the FDA Under Marty Makary
title_cn: 偏执、混乱和强烈反对：Marty Makary 领导下的 FDA 内部
summary: Insiders say one more high-profile misstep could put the commissioner’s job in jeopardy.

title: Array of Spy Antennas Prompts Austria to Expel Russian Envoys
title_cn: 一系列间谍天线促使奥地利驱逐俄罗斯特使
summary: Austria expelled three Russian diplomats suspected of espionage after investigators linked their activities to an apparent expansion of signals-intelligence capabilities at Russian embassy buildings in Vienna.

title: US Says Navy Ship Was Not Hit by Iranian Missiles
title_cn: 美国称海军舰艇没有被伊朗导弹击中
summary: The US says a Navy ship was not hit by Iranian missiles then forced to retreat near the Gulf of Oman. Meanwhile, the White House says the US will escort any stranded ships trying to go through the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Calls on China, Allies to Join US Operation in Hormuz
title_cn: 贝森特呼吁中国及其盟国加入美国在霍尔木兹的行动
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent called on US allies and on China to join an American operation to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz even as he claimed the nation has total control of the vital waterway for the global oil trade.

title: EU to Allocate More Free Carbon Permits to Industry
title_cn: 欧盟将向工业分配更多免费碳许可证
summary: The European Commission is set to propose granting about €4 billion ($4.7 billion) more of free emission permits to the industries covered by the bloc’s carbon market, addressing concerns by some governments and manufacturers over the region’s declining competitiveness.

title: Germany’s Klingbeil Renews Call for EU Windfall Tax on Energy
title_cn: 德国克林贝尔再次呼吁欧盟征收能源暴利税
summary: German Vice Chancellor Lars Klingbeil continued to push for a European Union windfall tax to cushion the fallout from the energy price spike for households and companies.

title: Canada Giving $1.1 Billion to Firms Hit by US Metal Tariff Rules
title_cn: 加拿大向受美国金属关税规则打击的企业提供 11 亿美元
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government unveiled measures worth C$1.5 billion ($1.1 billion) to help Canadian firms hurt by the Trump administration’s changes to US tariffs on imports containing steel, aluminum and copper.

title: EU Vows Action If Trump Adopts Car Tariffs, But Urges Restraint
title_cn: 如果特朗普采取汽车关税，欧盟誓言采取行动，但敦促克制
summary: Europe will consider all retaliatory options should US President Donald Trump follow through on his threat to raise tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, the bloc’s finance ministers said.

title: US Allies Look to Europe to Build a Post-Trump Global Order
title_cn: 美国盟友期待欧洲建立后特朗普时代的全球秩序
summary: Some of the US’s closest allies including Canada and the UK are warning that the international system of security and trade championed by western powers for more than 70 years is broken beyond repair — and that it’s up to Europe to fashion a new global order.

title: UBS CEO Attends Swiss Parliament as Capital Debate Kicks Off
title_cn: 瑞银首席执行官出席瑞士议会资本辩论拉开帷幕
summary: UBS Group AG Chief Executive Officer Sergio Ermotti was among attendees at a meeting to kick-start the legislative process that will determine the bank’s future capital needs.

title: US Hormuz Plan Leaves Shipowners Guessing as Attacks Persist
title_cn: 美国霍尔木兹计划让船东们猜测，袭击仍在继续
summary: A fresh plan announced by US President Donald Trump to help vessels through the Strait of Hormuz has left shipping executives perplexed, as attacks continued and traffic remains at a near standstill.

title: Five Key Questions Hanging Over the Midterms
title_cn: 中期选举面临的五个关键问题
summary: These issues facing both parties are likely to decide who wins in November

title: Nigeria’s Obi Quits Opposition Coalition in Boost for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚奥比退出反对派联盟以提振蒂努布
summary: One of Nigeria’s top opposition politicians quit a coalition that planned to run against President Bola Tinubu in January 2027 elections, improving the incumbent’s chances of retaining power.

title: Drone Hits Upscale Moscow Tower as City Readies for Parade
title_cn: 无人机袭击莫斯科高档大厦，城市准备游行
summary: A drone hit a residential tower in an upscale Moscow district in a rare strike near the city center ahead of the traditional World War II Victory Day parade.

title: US Denies Iran Report That Naval Ship Was Hit by Missiles
title_cn: 美国否认伊朗有关军舰被导弹击中的报道
summary: The US denied a report by Iranian media on Monday that the country had struck an American naval vessel with missiles, Axios reported citing a senior official. Oil prices and stocks pared back some of their earlier moves.

title: A New Contest for Global Influence Is Emerging in the Caucasus
title_cn: 高加索地区正在兴起一场新的全球影响力争夺战
summary: Armenia is hosting twin summits as the region comes increasingly in geopolitical focus.

title: Colombian Presidential Candidate Seeks Trump’s Help for War on Cocaine Gangs
title_cn: 哥伦比亚总统候选人寻求特朗普帮助打击可卡因帮派
summary: Lea en español

title: Ukraine Strikes on Russian Ports Are Self-Defense, Estonia Says
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚称乌克兰对俄罗斯港口的袭击是自卫
summary: Estonian Prime Minister Kristen Michal maintained his backing for Kyiv’s campaign of attacks against Russian port facilities in the Baltic region after Ukrainian drones again strayed into Estonian and Finnish territory.

title: French Far-Left’s Melenchon to Run in 2027 Presidential Election
title_cn: 法国极左翼政党梅朗雄将参加 2027 年总统选举
summary: Jean-Luc Melenchon said he will run for French president for a fourth time, positioning himself as the most established left-wing contender in the race to succeed Emmanuel Macron in 2027.

title: Two US Service Members Go Missing During Exercise in Morocco
title_cn: 两名美国军人在摩洛哥演习期间失踪
summary: Two US Army service members went missing in Morocco during a training exercise, the US Africa Command said Sunday.

title: NATO Chief Says US Disappointed in Europe Over Iran Response
title_cn: 北约秘书长表示美国对欧洲对伊朗的反应感到失望
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte warned European leaders that US President Donald Trump is disappointed with their reluctance to assist with the war in Iran.

title: Nigeria Rebukes South Africa Over Attacks Against Its Citizens
title_cn: 尼日利亚谴责南非针对其公民的袭击
summary: Nigeria’s foreign ministry summoned South Africa’s envoy to complain about xenophobic attacks against its citizens, weeks after a similar complaint was lodged by Ghana.

title: EU Seeks US Trade Talk, But Ready to Respond, Top Official Says
title_cn: 高级官员表示，欧盟寻求美国贸易谈判，但已准备好做出回应
summary: Europe is ready to respond should US President Donald Trump follow through on his threat to raise tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, according to Eurogroup President Kyriakos Pierrakakis.

title: China’s Unprecedented Defiance of US Sanctions Triggers Showdown
title_cn: 中国史无前例地藐视美国制裁引发摊牌
summary: China has ordered its companies to ignore US sanctions, an unprecedented act of defiance that threatens to trap a vast banking sector in the crossfire as tension rises between the world’s largest economies.

title: Asian Buyers Offer Big Premium for Diesel-Rich Crude From UAE
title_cn: 亚洲买家为来自阿联酋的富含柴油的原油提供高额溢价
summary: Some Asian refiners offered to buy Upper Zakum crude from the United Arab Emirates at around $20 a barrel above official prices, as processors scramble for medium-sour grades after the Iran war disrupted supply.
